register.title: CREATE
register.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields
register.success: Account created! Check your email to verify.

forgotPassword.title: RESET
forgotPassword.success: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent

verification.title: VERIFY
verification.message: We sent a verification link to your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
verification.checkSpam: Don't forget to check your spam folder.
verification.notYet: Email not yet verified. Please check your inbox.
verification.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
verification.checkFailed: Could not check status. Try again.

totp.title: Two-Factor Authentication
totp.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
totp.backupHint: Lost your device? Enter a backup code instead.
totp.invalidCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
